overall.description: Third-person game engine footage of a hooded character with a white mask exploring a rustic bedroom interior with wooden beams, thatched roofing, and antique furnishings including a spinning wheel. The character moves from a staircase landing through the bedroom and back down the stairs in a continuous exploration sequence.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic bedroom with spinning wheel and wooden bed

events.description: character moves from wooden staircase landing into the main bedroom area

agents.ego_description: walking from the staircase landing into the bedroom, approaching the spinning wheel and wooden bed while looking around the rustic interior

entered.detail: weathered wooden staircase railing with thick posts
antique wooden bed frame with white pillows and a bag on the footboard
large wooden spinning wheel with star-patterned fabric draped over it
heavy red patterned curtains framing the window area
tall empty wooden bookshelf against the stone wall
exposed wooden beams with thatched straw roofing visible overhead
large circular woven rug covering the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The character moves from a wooden staircase landing into a rustic bedroom interior. The space features a large spinning wheel with patterned fabric, an antique wooden bed, and exposed thatched roofing with wooden beams. Natural light filters through windows as the character walks across a circular rug toward the back of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: bedroom corner with fabric storage and thatched ceiling

events.description: character stops walking and begins turning around to face the camera
character faces camera directly revealing a white wooden mask with red eye holes

agents.ego_description: examining the fabric rolls and spinning wheel in the corner, then turning around to reveal a white mask face to the camera

entered.detail: rolled textiles and fabrics stacked on wall-mounted racks
low wooden storage chest with metal handles
small multi-paned window with light streaming through

segments.scene_description: The character explores the back corner of the bedroom near the spinning wheel and fabric storage racks. The camera pans to show the thatched roof beams and a small window. The character then turns around, revealing a distinctive white wooden mask with red accents and dark eye holes, before beginning to move back toward the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase with wall sconces descending to lower level

events.description: character exits the bedroom and returns to the staircase landing
character begins descending the wooden staircase downward

agents.ego_description: walking back through the bedroom to the landing, then turning and descending the wooden staircase toward the lower level

entered.detail: wooden crates and boxes stacked near the window with red curtains
iron wall-mounted candle holder with lit candles
steep wooden staircase leading down to the lower floor

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bedroom back to the landing area where wooden crates are stacked near a window with red curtains. The lighting becomes dimmer as the character turns and descends a steep wooden staircase illuminated by wall sconces, moving away from the bedroom level toward the floor below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit rustic bedroom back down into the dim depths of a wooden staircase. It begins as the character steps from a landing into a room filled with natural light, passing an antique bed and a large spinning wheel with patterned fabric under exposed thatched roofing. As the character explores the back corner near fabric storage racks, the camera pans across the ceiling beams before turning to reveal the character's white wooden mask with red accents. The scene then shifts as the character retreats toward the entrance, passing stacked wooden crates and red curtains on the landing. Finally, the lighting dims as the camera follows the character descending a steep wooden staircase illuminated by wall sconces, moving away from the bedroom level toward the floor below.
